Examples.Title: Create temporary API key
Examples.Description: Creates a short-lived API key for specific temporary use cases. The key will automatically expire after the specified duration.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Soniox;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Delete file
Examples.Code:
### Delete file
# @name delete_file
DELETE {{host}}/v1/files/{{file_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 204
# Description: File deleted.
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: File not found.

Error types:
- `file_not_found`: File could not be found.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get file
Examples.Description: Retrieve metadata for an uploaded file.
Examples.Code:
### Get file
# @name get_file
GET {{host}}/v1/files/{{file_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: File metadata.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: File not found.

Error types:
- `file_not_found`: File could not be found.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get files
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Soniox;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get files count
Examples.Description: Returns the total number of files, split by source.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Soniox;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Upload file
Examples.Code:
### Upload file
# @name upload_file
POST {{host}}/v1/files
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Uploaded file.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid request.

Error types:
- `invalid_request`:
  - Invalid request.
  - Exceeded maximum file size (maximum is 1073741824 bytes).

# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get models
Examples.Description: Retrieves list of available models and their attributes.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Soniox;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create transcription
Examples.Code:
### Create transcription
# @name create_transcription
POST {{host}}/v1/transcriptions
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "model": "string",
  "audio_url": "string",
  "file_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000",
  "language_hints": [
    "string"
  ],
  "language_hints_strict": true,
  "enable_speaker_diarization": true,
  "enable_language_identification": true,
  "translation": {
    "type": "one_way",
    "target_language": "string",
    "language_a": "string",
    "language_b": "string"
  },
  "context": {
    "general": [
      {}
    ],
    "text": "string",
    "terms": [
      "string"
    ],
    "translation_terms": [
      {}
    ]
  },
  "webhook_url": "string",
  "webhook_auth_header_name": "string",
  "webhook_auth_header_value": "string",
  "client_reference_id": "string"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Created transcription.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid request.

Error types:
- `invalid_request`: Invalid request.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete transcription
Examples.Description: Permanently deletes a transcription and its associated files. Cannot delete transcriptions that are currently processing.
Examples.Code:
### Delete transcription
# @name delete_transcription
DELETE {{host}}/v1/transcriptions/{{transcription_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 204
# Description: Transcription deleted.
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Transcription not found.

Error types:
- `transcription_not_found`: Transcription could not be found.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 409
# Description: Invalid transcription state.

Error types:
- `transcription_invalid_state`:
  - Cannot delete transcription with processing status.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get transcription
Examples.Description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific transcription.
Examples.Code:
### Get transcription
# @name get_transcription
GET {{host}}/v1/transcriptions/{{transcription_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Transcription details.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Transcription not found.

Error types:
- `transcription_not_found`: Transcription could not be found.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get transcription transcript
Examples.Description: Retrieves the full transcript text and detailed tokens for a completed transcription. Only available for successfully completed transcriptions.
Examples.Code:
### Get transcription transcript
# @name get_transcription_transcript
GET {{host}}/v1/transcriptions/{{transcription_id}}/transcript
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Transcription transcript.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Authentication error.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Transcription not found.

Error types:
- `transcription_not_found`: Transcription could not be found.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 409
# Description: Invalid transcription state.

Error types:
- `transcription_invalid_state`:
  - Can only get transcript with completed status.
  - File transcription has failed.
  - Transcript no longer available.

# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Internal server error.
# Content-Type: application/json
